# acme.example.tagdoc

## Messages and enums

### TagDocExample

Annotation from `<environment>` CoT detail element.
 Maps to ATAK's `<zMist>` inside `<zMistsMap>`.

```protobuf
message [TagDocExample](#tagdocexample) {
// Field note from <sensor> (stays inside fence — unescaped).
  string name = 1;
}
```
